subject: IPN BURST POSITION
body:
TITLE: IPN BURST POSITION MESSAGE # 430
 NOTICE TYPE: SINGLE ERROR BOX
 APPROXIMATE EARTH-CROSSING TIME (DD MM YYYY UT): 25 11 2002 17:58:30
 APPROXIMATE 25-100 keV FLUENCE (ERG/CM^2):  8.7E-06
 APPROXIMATE 25-100 keV PEAK FLUX (ERG/CM^2/SEC):  7.8E-07 IN A 0.50 SEC INTERVAL
 APPROXIMATE T90 DURATION (S):  3.00E+01
 ERROR BOX CENTER:  19 h 47 m 42.76 s     28 o 17 '   8.06 " 
 ERROR BOX CORNER 1: 19 h 46 m 49.27 s     28 o  9 '  14.20 " 
 ERROR BOX CORNER 2: 19 h 47 m 47.73 s     28 o 13 '   9.68 " 
 ERROR BOX CORNER 3: 19 h 47 m 37.78 s     28 o 21 '   6.43 " 
 ERROR BOX CORNER 4: 19 h 48 m 36.40 s     28 o 25 '   0.85 " 

 APPROXIMATE ERROR BOX AREA (SQ. ARCMIN.):  1.11E+02
 COMMENTS: This is a preliminary, 3 sigma error box.
 COMMENTS: GCN message is being issued.
